head_commit.message:
Add compile-time per-module log prefix via __log_prefix!()

Extend the logging system with compile-time log prefixes that can
be configured per module. Each module can define a `__log_prefix`
function (via the `__log_prefix!()` macro) to prepend contextual
information to log messages, such as "[IOMMU]", "[Virtio]", etc.

Changes:
- Add `prefix` field to `Record` for carrying per-message prefixes
- Extend `log!` macro to capture module-level `__log_prefix` if defined
- Add `__log_prefix!()` convenience macro for declaring prefixes
- Migrate existing manual bracket prefixes to use the new system
- Convert fadvise64 warn! calls to warn_once! for cleaner output

Changes:
- Add `prefix` field to `Record` for carrying per-message prefixes
- Extend `log!` macro to capture module-level `__log_prefix` if defined
- Add `__log_prefix!()` convenience macro for declaring prefixes
- Migrate existing manual bracket prefixes to use the new system
- Convert fadvise64 warn! calls to warn_once! for cleaner output

head_commit.message:
Update logging guidelines to use OSTD's logging API

- Replace "Use log crate macros exclusively" with "Use OSTD logging
  macros exclusively" (ostd-log-only guideline)
- Update log level table to show all 8 OSTD levels (emerg through
  debug) matching syslog(2), replacing the old 5-level table
- Add new "log-variants" guideline for rate-limited and print-once
  macros with usage examples
- Update code examples to use bare `info!`/`warn!` instead of
  `log::info!`/`log::warn!`
- Update AGENTS.md summary

run.display_title: Replace the log crate with OSTD's own logging API

head_commit.message:
Add compile-time per-module log prefix via __log_prefix!()

Extend the logging system with compile-time log prefixes that can
be configured per module. Each module can define a `__log_prefix`
function (via the `__log_prefix!()` macro) to prepend contextual
information to log messages, such as "[IOMMU]", "[Virtio]", etc.

Changes:
- Add `prefix` field to `Record` for carrying per-message prefixes
- Extend `log!` macro to capture module-level `__log_prefix` if defined
- Add `__log_prefix!()` convenience macro for declaring prefixes
- Migrate existing manual bracket prefixes to use the new system
- Convert fadvise64 warn! calls to warn_once! for cleaner output

Add compile-time per-module log prefix via __log_prefix!()

Extend the logging system with compile-time log prefixes that can
be configured per module. Each module can define a `__log_prefix`
function (via the `__log_prefix!()` macro) to prepend contextual
information to log messages, such as "[IOMMU]", "[Virtio]", etc.

Changes:
- Add `prefix` field to `Record` for carrying per-message prefixes
- Extend `log!` macro to capture module-level `__log_prefix` if defined
- Add `__log_prefix!()` convenience macro for declaring prefixes
- Migrate existing manual bracket prefixes to use the new system
- Convert fadvise64 warn! calls to warn_once! for cleaner output
